case_title: TAKASHI OKAZAKI VS. THOMAS MUELLER et al

docket_entries.description: UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF OKAZAKI, TAKASHI AS TO DEFENDANT MUELLER, THOMAS DOES 1 THRU 10, INCL. SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
REQUEST FOR CLERK'S JUDGMENT BY DEFAULT AS TO DEFENDANT MUELLER, THOMAS

ORDER FOR JUDGMENT PURSUANT TO STIPULATION FOR MONEY JUDGMENT
EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ORDER FOR JUDGMENT PURSUANT TO STIPULATION FOR MONEY JUDGMENT, DECLARATION FILED BY PLAINTIFF OKAZAKI, TAKASHI
THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING AMENDED JUDGMENT ENTERED: PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT THOMAS MUELLER IN THE SUM OF $16,280.00 FOR UNPAID RENT. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF OKAZAKI, TAKASHI SERVED APR-18-2012, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT MUELLER, THOMAS
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS AS TO DEFENDANT MUELLER, THOMAS

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OKAZAKI, TAKASHI RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MUELLER, THOMAS THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 751 - 16TH AVEUNE, SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94118, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
STIPULATION FOR MONEY JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF OKAZAKI, TAKASHI AS TO DEFENDANT MUELLER, THOMAS
